'''âp-v-d''' ('''kapavad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photoproduce|photoproduce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photoproduce|photoproduce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-v-d
|-
! Lemma
| kapavad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipavad|thipavad]] || [[word:jipavad|jipavad]] || [[word:shipavad|shipavad]] || [[word:kipavad|kipavad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupavad|thuthupavad]] || [[word:jujupavad|jujupavad]] || [[word:shushupavad|shushupavad]] || [[word:kukupavad|kukupavad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupavad|thupavad]] || [[word:jupavad|jupavad]] || [[word:shupavad|shupavad]] || [[word:kupavad|kupavad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupavad|thupavad]] || [[word:jupavad|jupavad]] || [[word:shupavad|shupavad]] || [[word:kupavad|kupavad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepavad|thepavad]] || [[word:jepavad|jepavad]] || [[word:shepavad|shepavad]] || [[word:kepavad|kepavad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopavad|thothopavad]] || [[word:jojopavad|jojopavad]] || [[word:shoshopavad|shoshopavad]] || [[word:kokopavad|kokopavad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopavad|thopavad]] || [[word:jopavad|jopavad]] || [[word:shopavad|shopavad]] || [[word:kopavad|kopavad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopavad|thopavad]] || [[word:jopavad|jopavad]] || [[word:shopavad|shopavad]] || [[word:kopavad|kopavad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpavad|thĂŠpavad]] || [[word:jĂŠpavad|jĂŠpavad]] || [[word:shĂŠpavad|shĂŠpavad]] || [[word:kĂŠpavad|kĂŠpavad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapavad|thathapavad]] || [[word:jajapavad|jajapavad]] || [[word:shashapavad|shashapavad]] || [[word:kakapavad|kakapavad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapavad|thapavad]] || [[word:japavad|japavad]] || [[word:shapavad|shapavad]] || [[word:kapavad|kapavad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapavad|thapavad]] || [[word:japavad|japavad]] || [[word:shapavad|shapavad]] || [[word:kapavad|kapavad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapavad|shapavad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapavad|goshapavad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapavad|gokishapavad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapavadnĂŒ|shapavadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapavadnknĂŒ|goshapavadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapavadnĂŒ|gokishapavadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapavadshĂ«|shapavadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapavadnkshĂ«|goshapavadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapavadshĂ«|gokishapavadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapavadro|shapavadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapavadnkro|goshapavadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapavadro|gokishapavadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapavadmu|shapavadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapavadnkmu|goshapavadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapavadmu|gokishapavadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapavadsher|shapavadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapavadnksher|goshapavadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapavadsher|gokishapavadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapavadng|shapavadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapavadnkng|goshapavadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapavadng|gokishapavadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapavadya|shapavadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapavadnkya|goshapavadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapavadya|gokishapavadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapavadyam|shapavadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapavadnkyam|goshapavadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapavadyam|gokishapavadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapavadnĂŒshĂ«|shapavadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapavadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapavadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapavadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapavadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapavadnĂŒro|shapavadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapavadnknĂŒro|goshapavadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapavadnĂŒro|gokishapavadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapavadnĂŒmu|shapavadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapavadnknĂŒmu|goshapavadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapavadnĂŒmu|gokishapavadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapavadshĂ«nĂŒ|shapavadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapavadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapavadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapavadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapavadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapavadshĂ«ro|shapavadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapavadnkshĂ«ro|goshapavadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapavadshĂ«ro|gokishapavadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapavadshĂ«mu|shapavadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapavadnkshĂ«mu|goshapavadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapavadshĂ«mu|gokishapavadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapavadronĂŒ|shapavadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapavadnkronĂŒ|goshapavadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapavadronĂŒ|gokishapavadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapavadroshĂ«|shapavadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapavadnkroshĂ«|goshapavadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapavadroshĂ«|gokishapavadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapavadromu|shapavadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapavadnkromu|goshapavadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapavadromu|gokishapavadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapavadmunĂŒ|shapavadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapavadnkmunĂŒ|goshapavadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapavadmunĂŒ|gokishapavadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapavadmushĂ«|shapavadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapavadnkmushĂ«|goshapavadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapavadmushĂ«|gokishapavadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapavadmuro|shapavadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapavadnkmuro|goshapavadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapavadmuro|gokishapavadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
